hero.description: I build robust, scalable, and user-centric digital solutions with a focus on modern architectures and seamless user experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer with over 4 years of experience designing robust and user-centric digital solutions, particularly for public administration. With proven expertise across the complete software development lifecycle, I am deeply passionate about continuous innovation. That is why I am currently pursuing a Master's degree in Artificial Intelligence and Big Data (evening classes) to bridge my software engineering background with Data Analysis (Pandas, Numpy) and Machine Learning, aiming to build increasingly intelligent, data-driven applications.
about.profile: Passionate developer focused on creating intuitive, efficient, and data-driven solutions.
about.development: Full Stack expertise enriched by emerging capabilities in Data Science and AI.
about.languages: Fluent in French and English bridging communication and technical gaps.

items.company: Directorate General of Treasury and Public Accounting
items.description: Design and develop mission-critical solutions for government administration digitalization with focus on performance, security and scalability.

projects.name: Materials Accounting Software System
projects.details: Developed critical Java-based features using Spring MVC. Integrated MyBatis for data persistence. Established robust architecture using Spring framework.

projects.name: TMS/X Transaction Simulator
projects.details: Built intuitive web interface with full CRUD operations. Implemented secure integration with TMS/X API (XML/SWIFT). Developed local transaction persistence system.

projects.name: SODIGER - Digital Debt Recovery Solution
projects.details: Led complete UX/UI redesign. Integrated online payment module. Implemented POS terminal payment functionality. Developed barcode scanning system.

projects.name: Electronic Document Management (EDM) System
projects.details: Architected secure centralized document management platform. Built digital library. Implemented advanced search engine. Designed intuitive file explorer.

items.description: Developed new features for SCOOLDAY platform resulting in 30% increase in user engagement. Updated and optimized ERP system. Migrated SCOOLDAY codebase from Java 8 to Java 17 and Angular 8 to Angular 14.
Developed real estate management platform for Canadian market. Created immigration case management platform for agencies. Conducted UML analysis and design.

Project: SEGBAYA - E-commerce Platform for Digital, Physical and Audio Books. Conducted comprehensive business requirements analysis. Authored detailed technical specifications. Developed RESTful backend services.

items.title: Ayozia

items.title: Sygpress

items.title: Evergreen Bookstore

footer.description: Building digital experiences that matter with passion and precision.
